query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
## Summary

The most recent authoritative NIFC year-to-date acres burned figure available as of late June 2026 is:

**2,951,605 acres burned (35,424 wildfires), as of June 27, 2026.**

This comes directly from the **NIFC/NICC Incident Management Situation Report dated Saturday, June 27, 2026 (0730 MDT)** — the official source document behind the "National Fire News" statistics. At that point the season was running at **161% of the ten-year average** for acres burned and **135%** for number of fires.

For context on the trajectory: the figure rose from ~2.7 million acres / 34,038 fires (~June 22) to 2,951,605 acres / 35,424 fires (June 27), and continued to 3,578,017 acres / 38,956 fires by mid-July (July 12) on the current NIFC Statistics page.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report - Saturday June 27, 2026 - 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES: 35,424; TOTAL ACRES: 2,951,605. Ten Year Average: Fires 26,306 (135%); Acres 1,829,590 (161%).

sources.title: National Wildfire Update June 2026 - Rising Fire Activity and Resource Demand
sources.snippet: National Fire News June 22, 2026: 34,038 fires have burned more than 2.7 million acres year-to-date.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Year-to-date Wildfires 38,956; Year-to-date Acres Burned 3,578,017. Last Updated Sunday, July 12, 2026.

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: So far this year, 38,956 fires have burned more than 3.5 million acres across the United States (current as of mid-July 2026).

sources.title: Map Shows All Major Wildfires Burning Across More Than Half A Million Acres
sources.snippet: As of ~July 3, 2026 update: 27,446 fires, 2.07 million acres (figures appear partial/inconsistent vs official NIFC data).

key_facts: NIFC year-to-date acres burned as of June 27, 2026 was 2,951,605 acres (authoritative IMSR figure).
NIFC year-to-date wildfires as of June 27, 2026 was 35,424 fires.
This was the most recent authoritative NIFC YTD figure available as of late June 2026.
The June 27, 2026 acres total was 161% of the 2016-2025 ten-year average (10-yr avg 1,829,590 acres).
The June 27, 2026 fire count was 135% of the ten-year average (10-yr avg 26,306 fires).
Around June 22, 2026, National Fire News reported ~34,038 fires and >2.7 million acres YTD.
By July 11-12, 2026, the NIFC Statistics page showed 38,956 fires and 3,578,017 acres YTD.
On June 27, 2026 the National Preparedness Level was 3, with 37 uncontained large fires and 77 active large incidents.
Rocky Mountain (1,260,481 acres) and Southern (1,057,714 acres) geographic areas carried the largest YTD acreage burdens as of June 27, 2026.
